headline: Will the Lhoist Acquisition Strengthen Martin Marietta's Market Lead?
summary: MLM's $13.5B Lhoist deal expands its lime business and Sun Belt footprint. But can expected synergies and long-term growth outweigh near-term leverage concerns?

headline: Martin Marietta: Lower Valuation And Lhoist M&A
summary: Martin Marietta Materials remains a high-quality, well-managed company, but valuation concerns persist despite recent share price declines. Learn more about MLM stock here.
